Interface TradingDaysPlusJpaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<TradingDaysPlus>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, TradingDaysBase, TradingDaysPlusJpaRepositoryCustom
public interface TradingDaysPlusJpaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<TradingDaysPlus, LocalDate>, TradingDaysPlusJpaRepositoryCustom

    • getGlobalHolidays

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) Set<LocalDate> getGlobalHolidays()
      Get global holidays from 2001-01-01 until now. Normally first of first of January and December 25 for each year.
